rules.label: Shortness of breath
rules.rationale: SOB with chest pain raises concern for acute coronary syndrome or PE

rules.label: Syncope
rules.rationale: Syncope with chest pain suggests hemodynamic instability

rules.label: Diaphoresis
rules.rationale: Diaphoresis with chest pain is classic ACS presentation

rules.label: Focal neurologic deficit
rules.rationale: Focal deficit suggests stroke or intracranial lesion

rules.label: Seizure
rules.rationale: New seizure with headache suggests ICH or mass lesion

rules.label: Mucosal involvement
rules.rationale: Mucosal involvement with rash raises concern for Stevens-Johnson syndrome

rules.label: Pain predominant over itch
rules.immediate_actions: Evaluate for cellulitis or necrotizing fasciitis
rules.rationale: Painful rash may indicate deeper infection
